item.title: READ
item.description: Year 1, Fall · Weeks 1–8 · 8-week block · 4 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: ➤ Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: READ computation. The first encounter with code is reading it, across two paradigms, before producing much.

item.title: MODIFY
item.description: Year 1, Fall · Weeks 9–16 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → ➤ Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: MODIFY data & state. Computation understood as the act of changing data.

item.title: MODEL
item.description: Year 1, Spring · Weeks 1–8 · 8-week block · 4 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → ➤ Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: MODEL & ABSTRACT. Modeling a domain and drawing boundaries around its parts.

item.title: STRUCTURE
item.description: Year 1, Spring · Weeks 9–16 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → ➤ Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: STRUCTURE across scales. The same idea — parts and relationships — in data, systems, networks, and the humans who build them.

item.title: STORE
item.description: Year 2, Fall · Weeks 1–8 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → ➤ Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: INFORMATION AT REST: shared, persistent, queryable structure — the Year-2 escalation from Year 1’s data-in-motion.

item.title: BUILD
item.description: Year 2, Fall · Weeks 9–16 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → ➤ Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: RESPONSIBLE DEVELOPMENT. Building software you can stand behind: correct, safe, collaborative — three facets of one professional stance.

item.title: JUDGE
item.description: Block 7 — INTEGRATION & JUDGMENT — design under uncertainty Year 2, Spring · Weeks 1–8 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → ➤ Judge (B7) → Operate (B8)

item.title: OPERATE
item.description: Year 2, Spring · Weeks 9–16 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → Judge (B7) → ➤ Operate (B8) Purpose Cognitive frame: IN PRODUCTION: delivery, operation & accountability — the system meets the real world. Closes the two-year arc and bridges to the capstone.
